_curation_status: SEED_ONLY — 5 representative cases. Production target: 100 hand-rated cases curated by a PMHNP recruiter or clinical director per docs/ai-implementation-plan.md ticket 0.2.4. Until that curation lands, the eval CI gate runs but the small N means the threshold floor is advisory, not statistically significant.
description: Candidate scoring golden cases. Each case is a (job, candidate) pair with a human-rated expected score band ±10pt by default and optional must/mustNotMention assertions on matchReasons.

cases.description: Board-certified PMHNP with 8 years experience, licensed in the job's state, telehealth-experienced — should score 90+
